{"body":"# Enhancement: FAB and chat window should use RTL-aware positioning

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Enhancement |
| **Scope** | Frontend |
| **Priority** | 🟡 P2 — Medium |

## Summary
Replace hardcoded `right-6` with Tailwind logical property `end-6` so the FAB and chat window appear on the correct side in RTL (Hebrew) vs LTR (English).

## Requirements
Swap `right-6` → `end-6` in two files:
- `src/ui/web/learning-agent/FloatingAgentButton/index.tsx` — line 23: `fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-[60]`
- `src/ui/web/learning-agent/AgentChatWindow/index.tsx` — line 167: `fixed bottom-24 right-6 z-[70]`

## Affected Area
src/ui/web/learning-agent/FloatingAgentButton/index.tsx, src/ui/web/learning-agent/AgentChatWindow/index.tsx

## Acceptance Criteria
- FAB appears bottom-left in Hebrew (RTL), bottom-right in English (LTR)
- Chat window aligns to same side as FAB

## Additional Context
**Research notes:**
- `end-6` is Tailwind's logical property: maps to `right` in LTR, `left` in RTL
- `useLocale` hook is available in the codebase (e.g. `src/ui/web/header/index.tsx` uses `import { useLocale } from '@/locale'`)
- No locale-aware positioning exists in either component currently — both hardcode `right-6`
